question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week.

assessment.note: They described the sprint as intense but clean, with 'mostly good energy' yet 'coasting a bit this week,' which supports a slight wellbeing lift and a small engagement dip.

new_queue.label: Refactor aftermath
new_queue.name: How did the payments refactor land for you after it shipped?

new_queue.label: Recognition fit
new_queue.name: What part of the team's reaction felt most real to you?

new_queue.label: Quiet signals
new_queue.name: I've noticed you've been quieter in standup this week — what's going on underneath that?

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: What kind of mentoring would actually fit into your week?

new_queue.label: Mentoring tradeoff
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make room for mentoring?

new_queue.label: Rewrite role
new_queue.name: What role would make sense for you in the billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Rewrite risk
new_queue.name: Where do you expect the billing rewrite to get difficult?

new_queue.label: Need to know
new_queue.name: What do you need to know before the billing rewrite starts?

new_queue.label: Blocker ownership
new_queue.name: What are you waiting on that could quietly stall you?

new_queue.label: Stretch edge
new_queue.name: What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?

new_queue.label: Next skill
new_queue.name: What skill do you want to sharpen over the next quarter?
